hypothesis: Augmenting MatAgent’s feedback with a predicted distance-to-convex-hull metric and instructing the LLM to jointly minimize hull distance and formation-energy deviation will increase the fraction of candidates that are DFT-relaxed stable (Ehull ≤ 0.05 eV/atom) at a fixed iteration budget without a statistically significant decrease in the V.U.N. score compared to formation-energy-only feedback.
